description_long: This fence consists of two robust, rectangular concrete posts supporting a central panel made of hexagonal wire mesh. The mesh is framed by a thin metal border, providing structural integrity and a clean geometric outline. The concrete posts are weathered, with visible texture and slight discoloration, suggesting outdoor use and durability. The wire mesh is tightly woven, forming a honeycomb pattern that allows visibility and airflow while serving as a barrier. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative elements, making it suitable for urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or construction sites. The top edge of the fence is flat, and the posts have no caps or finials.
description: A utilitarian fence with two concrete posts and a central hexagonal wire mesh panel framed in metal, featuring a flat top and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full hexagonal wire mesh panel framed by two concrete posts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the mesh and the depth of the concrete post.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the mesh and concrete posts from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness of the mesh and the thickness of the concrete post.
